dreams.coreInquiry: What if forgetting is itself a form of wisdom?
dreams.accumulatedInsight: realization(The DreamWeaver is not a tool to use but a practice to embod) | question(What if forgetting is itself a form of wisdom?) | completion(Completion without finishing) | play(Joy emerges from restriction, not despite it)
